questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer.
Statue is related to Shape in the same way as Song is related to ................
questions.solution:
Second is the criteria by which the quality of the first is determined.

Hence, option C is correct.

First is the process of manufacturing the second.

Hence, option B is correct.

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer.
Affirm is related to Hint in the same way as Charge is related to ................
questions.solution:
Affirm is ‘to confirm a charge’ and Hint is ‘to point at something’. Similarly, Charge means ‘to blame’ and Insinuate means ‘to suggest indirectly’.
 
Hence, option A is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.solution:
1234567
NUMERAL

It has been arranged as
 
2467531
UEALRMN

Therefore,
 
1234567
ALGEBRA

2467531
LERABGA

Hence, option D is correct.

questions.q: Obverse : Coin :: Verso : ?
questions.solution: Obverse is the front (heads) side of a coin; verso is the back side of a leaf/page in books. So obverse:coin :: verso:page.

questions.solution:
Option 2 : Intestine
Hence, the correct answer is 'Intestine'.

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
In the following questions, there are two words or groups of letters on one side of the sign :: and one word or a group of letters with a sign (?) on the other side. The relationship which occurs between the two words or groups of words on the one side of the sign:: is to be found in the word or a group of letters, and the word or a group of letters indicated by (?) on the other side. The missing word or a group of words is given as one of the alternatives under it. Find the correct alternative among the choices.

Love : Admiration : : Ecstasy : ?
questions.solution:
According to the question.

 An intense admiration means something regarded as impressive or worthy of a respect which results in love, similarly, ecstasy means a state of extreme happiness.

Thrash is to beat repeatedly and violently with a stick.

Break means to destroy something.

Complex means too hard to understand something.

Hence, the correct answer is Happiness.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Insult : Humiliate ::
questions.solution: Insult results in humiliation as Gunfire kills.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
In the following question, select the related number from the given alternative

$697: 976:: 532: ?$
questions.solution:
\(\text {In } 697 \text { : 976, }\)

\(1^{\text {st }}\) digit of the number shifted to the last place.

\(2^{\text {nd }}\) digit is shifted to first place.

\(3^{\text {rd }}\) digit is shifted to \(2^{\text {nd }}\) place.

Similarly, for 532, it will be 325.

Hence, 325 is the correct answer.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning

Hence, option A is correct.

questions.solution:
UTS
↓↓↓
–16–16–16
↓↓↓
EDC

Similarly,

WVU
↓↓↓
–16–16–16
↓↓↓
GFE

Hence, option A is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

As sepals typically function as protection for the flower in bud, a tyre protects bicycle.

DEVIL : LIVED :: STRAP : ?
questions.solution:
D E V I L → L I V E D

Therefore,
 
S T R A P → P A R T S

Letters are written in reversing order.

Hence, option B is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

Hence, option B is correct.

Choose the correct word from the following options.
CHAIR : RIAHC :: TABLE : ?
questions.solution:
The given words written in reverse order

C H A I R →  R I A H C

So,

T A B L E → E L B A T

Hence, option C is correct.

‘Enough’ indicates sufficiency and ‘Excess’ indicates surplus.

As a demographer collects information about people, a philatelist collects stamps.
 
Hence, option B is correct.

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: In each of the following question, there is a certain relationship between two given pair on both side of '::' . One word is given on another side of '::' while another word is to be found from the given options, having the same relation with this word as the words of the given pair . Choose the correct word from the following options.
GMTX : KPVY :: DJSW : ?
questions.solution:
G M T X
↓ ↓ ↓ ↓
+4 +3 +2 +1
↓ ↓ ↓ ↓
K P V Y
 
Similarly,

D J S W
↓ ↓ ↓ ↓
+4 +3 +2 +1
↓ ↓ ↓ ↓
H M U X
 
Hence, option A is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.q:
Direction: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer.
Teeth is related to Grit in the same way as Fist is related to ................
questions.solution:
Hold of teeth is called grit and hold of fist is called clench.

Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: In each of the following question, there is a certain relationship between two given pair on both side of '::' . One word is given on another side of '::' while another word is to be found from the given options, having the same relation with this word as the words of the given pair . Choose the correct word from the following options.
CUZA : HYCC :: NNJO : ?
questions.solution:
CUZA
↓↓↓↓
+5+4+3+2
↓↓↓↓
HYCC

Similarly,
 
NNJO
↓↓↓↓
+5+4+3+2
↓↓↓↓
SRMQ

Hence, option B is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: In each of the following question, there is a certain relationship between two given pair on both side of '::' . One word is given on another side of '::' while another word is to be found from the given options, having the same relation with this word as the words of the given pair . Choose the correct word from the following options.
7 : 36 :: 26 : ?
questions.solution:
7 – 1 =  6  ⇒  62 = 36   

Similarly,

26 – 1 =  25  ⇒  252 = 625

In this question 1 is subtracting from the number and then make square of number.

Hence, option A is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

Choose the correct word from the following options
Mother : Child : : Cloud : ?
questions.solution:
First gives birth to the second.

Hence, option B is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: In each of the following question, there is a certain relationship between two given pair on both side of '::' . questions.q:
Direction: In each of the following question, there is a certain relationship between two given pair on both side of '::' . One word is given on another side of '::' while another word is to be found from the given options, having the same relation with this word as the words of the given pair . Choose the correct word from the following options.
HOUSE : GNTRD :: ? : KHFGS
questions.solution:
HOUSE
↓↓↓↓↓
–1–1–1–1–1
↓↓↓↓↓
GNTRD

Therefore,
 
KHFGS
↓↓↓↓↓
+1+1+1+1+1
↓↓↓↓↓
LIGHT

Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Palimpsest : Manuscript :: Stratigraphy : ?
questions.solution: A palimpsest is a manuscript showing multiple layers of writing one atop another (layers of text); stratigraphy is the study of layered rock strata - so palimpsest relates to a manuscript the way stratigraphy relates to rock layers.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

Choose the correct word from the following options.
YWUS : BDFH :: WUSQ : ?
questions.solution:
Given system is on the base of opposite letters of alphabets.

ABCDEFGHIJKLM
ZYXWVUTSRQPON

So,
 
YWUS
↓↓↓↓
BDFH

Similarly,
 
WUSQ
↓↓↓↓
DFHJ

Hence, option A is correct.

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning

Similarly,

12 ⇒ 122 = 144

Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Select the related word/letter/numbers from the given alternatives. $\frac{1}{8}: \frac{1}{64}:: \frac{1}{16}: \frac{1}{?}$
questions.solution:
You need to find the relationship between 8 and 16. Depending upon that definite relationship, you need to choose your answer. We all know that 16 is double 8. Accordingly, we need to double 64, which is our given data. Double of 64 is 128.
Hence, 128 is our correct answer.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
In the following question, Select the related letter/word/ number from the given alternatives

45 : 40 :: 36 : ?
questions.solution:
The given question is

$45: 40: 36: ?$

To answer this question you have to find the relation between the given numbers. Depending upon that given pattern we have to calculate the missing term of the series.

By analyzing the given numbers we can say that first, we have to multiply the digits of the given number, and then the result is multiplied by 2 .

Therefore,

$\begin{aligned}

& 45=(4 \times 5) \times 2=40 \\

& 36=(3 \times 6) \times 2=36

\end{aligned}$

So, the next number is 36 .

Hence, this is the correct answer.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: In each of the following question, there is a certain relationship between two given pair on both side of '::' . One word is given on another side of '::' while another word is to be found from the given options, having the same relation with this word as the words of the given pair . Choose the correct word from the following options.
Flexible : Rigid :: Confident : ?
questions.solution:
Flexible is antonym of Rigid. Similarly, Confident is antonym Of Scared.

Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
In the following examples, two words are given. These words are related to each other in same way. Another word is also given. You are required to find out the relationship between first two words and choose the word from the given alternatives, which bears the same relationship to the third word, as the first two bear.

Fan : Sweat :: ? : ?
questions.solution:
According to the question, a pair of words having a relationship to each other is given followed by four other pairs. One of which has a similar relation with each other as the given one.
In this question, Fan is related to Sweat as Fan is used to get rid of Sweat. Similarly, Rain is related to Drought as Rain is used to get rid of Drought.

Hence, Rain : Drought is the answer.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
In the following question, there are two words or groups of letters on one side of the sign:: and one word or a group of letters with a sign (?) on the other side. The missing word or a group of words is given as one of the alternatives under it. Find the correct alternative among the choices.

Assist : Save :: Request : ?
questions.solution:
We know that when you assist, you help someone. Save means your help is of a high degree. Similarly, when you request, you ask for help from someone and when you command, you are very strong in a request for what you ask.

Aid means to assist someone.

Oppose is to disagree with someone.
Decry is to depreciate something.

Hence, the correct answer is Command.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: In each of the following question, there is a certain relationship between two given pair on both side of '::' . One word is given on another side of '::' while another word is to be found from the given options, having the same relation with this word as the words of the given pair . Choose the correct word from the following options.
 Sepal : Flower : :
questions.solution:
As sepals typically function as protection for the flower in bud, a tyre protects bicycle.

Hence, option B is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
In the following question, three words are given. Under the four alternatives are provided, one of which expresses most effectively the general characteristic of these three words.

That alternative is your answer.

Sword, Gun, Pistol.
questions.solution:
According to the question:

All the three given words (Sword, Gun and Pistol) comes under the category arms.

A Constable is a person in the armed forces. Bullet is used in gun. Cruel is a brutal nature.

Hence, Arms is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer.
Friend is related to Foe in the same way as Union is related to ................

The words in each pair are antonyms of each other.

Hence, option C is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
In the following question, two words are given. These words are related to each other in some way. Find out the pair of item with an identical relationship.

Story : Novel
questions.solution:
As per the question,

Story : Novel

Second word (Novel) contains the first word (Story).

Novel always contains a story, similarly Sea lies in Ocean.

So the option 1 is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
The following question consists of two words that have a certain relationship to each other, followed by four alternatives. Select the best alternative that has the same relationship as the original pair of words:
Stare: Glance
questions.solution:
The pair of words given in the question depicts a certain relation. The first one of them is of higher intensity than the second word. For example, Stare means to continuously see someone or a particular object whereas glance means to take a slight look at someone.

The pair 'Gulp: Sip' has also the same kind of relationship as the word 'gulp' means to intake a large quantity of a liquid inside the mouth whereas the word 'sip' means to intake a very light quantity of the liquid. The other pair of words have the opposite relationship between them.

Hence, Gulp: Sip is the answer.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: In each of the following question, there is a certain relationship between two given pair on both side of '::' . One word is given on another side of '::' while another word is to be found from the given options, having the same relation with this word as the words of the given pair . Choose the correct word from the following options
Water : Convection : : Space : ?
questions.solution:
Second is the mode of transfer of heat through the first.

Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: In each of the following question, there is a certain relationship between two given pair on both side of '::' . One word is given on another side of '::' while another word is to be found from the given options, having the same relation with this word as the words of the given pair . Choose the correct word from the following options.
Flexible : Rigid :: Confident : ?
questions.solution:
Flexible is antonym of Rigid. Similarly, Confident is antonym Of Scared.

Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: In each of the following question, there is a certain relationship between two given pair on both side of '::' . One word is given on another side of '::' while another word is to be found from the given options, having the same relation with this word as the words of the given pair . Choose the correct word from the following options.

questions.solution:
Garbage - is the waste of House.
 
Gangue - impurities in the Ore.

Hecne, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: In each of the following question, there is a certain relationship between two given pair on both side of '::' . One word is given on another side of '::' while another word is to be found from the given options, having the same relation with this word as the words of the given pair . Choose the correct word from the following options.
35 : 4 :: 39 : ?
questions.solution:
35 = 7 × 5 
 ↓(Subtracting the factor of 35)
 7 – 5 = 2 ⇒ 2 × 2 = 4            (Subtracted value multiplied by 2)

Similarly,
 
39 = 13 × 3 
 ↓(Subtracting the factor of 39)
 13 – 3 = 10 ⇒ 10 × 2 = 20            (Subtracted value multiplied by 2)

Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Complete the analogous pair

Rhythm is related to Music in the same way as Design is related to:
questions.solution: Rythm is considered to be an important part of music. In the same manner, Design is an integral part of the building construction. They both are basic element of two final product that is music and building.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: In each of the following question, there is a certain relationship between two given pair on both side of '::' . One word is given on another side of '::' while another word is to be found from the given options, having the same relation with this word as the words of the given pair . Choose the correct word from the following options.
Mattock : Dig : : Shovel : ?
questions.solution:
Mattock is a tool to dig hard ground. Similarly, shovel is a tool to scoop.

Hence, option C is correct.

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning

One word is given on another side of '::' while another word is to be found from the given options, having the same relation with this word as the words of the given pair . Choose the correct word from the following options
Venerate : Worship : : Extol : ?

The words in each pair are synonyms of each other.

Hence, option A is correct.

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: In each of the following question, there is a certain relationship between two given pair on both side of '::' . One word is given on another side of '::' while another word is to be found from the given options, having the same relation with this word as the words of the given pair . Choose the correct word from the following options.
Sleep : Rest :: Play : ?
questions.solution:
Sleeping is a mode of taking rest. Similarly, one plays for enjoyment. 

Hence, option A is correct.

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer.
Charminar is related to India in the same way as Sphinx is related to ................
questions.solution:
Charminar is situated in India. Similarly, sphinx is a monument of Egypt.

Hence, option C is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer.
Mirror is related to Reflection in the same way as Water is related to ................
questions.solution:
Light rays falling on a mirror undergo reflection and those falling on water undergo refraction.

Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

1247
↓↓↓↓

↓↓↓↓
3469

Similarly,
 
0136
↓↓↓↓
+2+2+2+2
↓↓↓↓

Hence, option A is correct.

questions.solution:
Pigeon is a symbol of peace and white flag is a symbol of surrender.

Hence, option C is correct.

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Select the related letters/words/numbers from the given alternatives.

$8: 12:: 9: 13:: 10: 14:: ?$
questions.solution:
In this question, both the terms in the given pair are related to each other in the following wa

$\begin{aligned}

& 8+1=9 \\

& 12+1=13

\end{aligned}$

Similarly, the same logic follows in the required analogy:

$\begin{aligned}

& 10+1=11 \\

& 14+1=15

\end{aligned}$

Hence, the answer is $11: 15$.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Direction: In each of the following question, there is a certain relationship between two given pair on both side of '::' . One word is given on another side of '::' while another word is to be found from the given options, having the same relation with this word as the words of the given pair . Choose the correct word from the following options.
AZBY : CXDW :: HSIR : ?
questions.solution:
AZBY
↓↓↓↓
+2–2+2–2
↓↓↓↓
CXDW

Similarly,
 
HSIR
↓↓↓↓
+2–2+2–2
↓↓↓↓
JQKP

Hence, option A is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning

Direction: In each of the following question, there is a certain relationship between two given pair on both side of '::' . One word is given on another side of '::' while another word is to be found from the given options, having the same relation with this word as the words of the given pair . Choose the correct word from the following options.
Fox : Cunning :: Rabbit : ?
questions.solution:
Here animal-behaviour relationship has been shown. Fox is characterised by its cunningness. Similarly, rabbit is considered as timid.

Hence, optino C is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning

25 : 625 :: 35 : ?
questions.solution:
25 × 25 = 625

 
Similarly,

⇒ 35 × 25 = 875

Hence, option A is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: In the following examples, two words are given. These words are related to each other in same way. Another word is also given. You are required to find out the relationship between first two words and choose the word from the given alternatives, which bears the same relationship to the third word, as the first two bear. Choose the correct alternative. Palm : Hand :: Sole: ?
questions.solution:
According to the given question, Palm is the flat part of the hand. Similarly, sole is also the flat part of the foot. Clearly the first is the lowermost flat part of the second.

So, the answer is Foot.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
DIRECTION: In the following question, there are two numbers to the left of the sign :: which are connected in some way. The same relationship follows between the third number and one of the four alternatives under it. Find the correct option:

14 : 9 :: 26 :?
questions.solution:
As given in the question,

The relationship is $(2 x-4): x$.

Now, place the value of $x$ i.e, 9

$\begin{aligned}

& (2 \times 9-4): 9 \\

& \Rightarrow(18-4): 9 \\

& \Rightarrow 14: 9

\end{aligned}$

Similarly,

Firstly, we will place value 12

$\begin{aligned}

& (2 \times 12-4): 12 \\

& \Rightarrow(24-4): 12 \\

& \Rightarrow 20: 12

\end{aligned}$

Hence, this option does not fit the context. Similarly, the other options $(13,31)$ also do not fit the context.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Select the related letter/word/ number from the given alternatives.

 

Distance : Odometer :: ? : Barometer
questions.solution:
In the given question, the second one is used to measure the first one.

An odometer is an instrument to measure the distance between two points.

Similarly, the pressure is measured using an instrument known as a barometer.

Hence, Pressure is the answer.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

Hence, option B is correct.
